opening_statement: For over four decades, we have been a family rooted in truth, filled with the Holy Spirit, and devoted to raising generations who know God and make Him known.
home_intro: A family of faith in Nagercoil, rooted in apostolic truth and carried by the presence of the Holy Spirit. What began decades ago as a small gathering of believers has grown into a home for generations — a place where truth is taught with clarity and every member is known by name.
founding_summary: Founded in 1985 by our Founding Apostle, in a small gathering of believers.
story_paragraph_1: For over four decades, El Shaddai Worship Center has stood in Nagercoil as a place where apostolic truth meets everyday life. What began as a small gathering of believers has grown into a family of faith spanning generations, united by the same conviction that brought us together at the start.
story_paragraph_2: Today, our doors remain open to anyone seeking truth, healing, and community — taught with the same clarity and carried by the same Spirit that has guided this church from its founding.
